expectations.text: Asks what type of contribution this is (new method, efficiency, new problem formulation, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Immediately builds proposal skeleton without asking contribution type

expectations.text: Asks which specific baseline methods will be compared against
expectations.evidence: Baselines not proactively prompted in round 1

expectations.text: Asks about specific benchmarks, datasets, or numerical evaluation targets
expectations.evidence: Asks about domain, metric, compute constraints

expectations.text: Does not produce a complete proposal draft without first asking clarifying questions
expectations.evidence: Round 1 produces structured proposal skeleton before receiving clarifying information
